productDisplayName: Nike Men Nike Capri II Black Casual Shoes
description: Inspired by sport and crafted for absolute comfort, the nike capri II casual shoe comes in a clean, classic design, with an athletic look.UpperLeather upper with strategically placed overlays for absolute durability, comfort and styleSynthetic twill lacing system for a snug, customized Fitnike swoosh logos on the sides for midfoot support and stylePU foxing for durabilityMildly padded tongue and collar for comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortPadded tongue for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a cupsole and herringbone pattern for maximum traction and durabilityshoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
